request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom and a patriot, I've always supported strategic autonomy. But after seeing how our allies keep pushing us to take on more of their security burdens, I'm starting to question if we're being played. Why should we keep relying on others when we could be stronger on our own? #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongerTogether
